words.def: (theater) the space over the stage (out of view of the audience) used to store scenery (drop curtains)
a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together
words.zh: n. 檔案, 公文箱, 資料夾, 檔案, 卷宗, 銼刀

words.def: a characteristic state or mode of living
words.zh: n. 生活, 生命, 人生, 世事, 生物, 壽命, 一生, 生命力, 靈魂, 無期徒刑

words.def: your consciousness of your own identity
words.zh: n. 自己, 自我, 本性, 本質, 私心, 本人

words.def: a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth
words.zh: n. 謊言, 假象, 位置
